tests.label: Right-click card shows card context menu
No hash defaults to Music Lab + Design Board
Binary Explorer starts with empty scene + binary overview

steps.name: be_initial_empty
steps.text: The graph area should show an EMPTY SCENE prompt with seed buttons. The data panel should show binary overview. No nodes should be in the graph SVG area.

tests.label: Seed Namespaces adds only namespace nodes (no neighbors)

steps.name: be_seed_namespaces
steps.text: The graph should show 3-8 circular nodes spread across the canvas with visible labels. Nodes should not be crammed together. The scene counter should show a small number.

tests.label: Click node adds only that node (no neighbor explosion)

steps.name: be_click_node_no_explosion
steps.text: A node should be highlighted with a purple glow. Edges (colored lines) should connect to neighbor nodes. The data panel should show the selected node name and connection count.

steps.name: be_context_menu_expand
steps.text: More nodes should have appeared compared to before. Edges should be visible connecting the expanded node to its new neighbors. Scene counter should have increased.

tests.label: Chat question renders and gets LLM response

steps.name: be_chat_question
steps.text: The chat panel should show a user message bubble and an assistant response bubble with markdown-formatted text about binary features.

tests.label: Thumbs up/down buttons appear on assistant messages

steps.name: be_thumbs_visible
steps.text: Below an assistant message, there should be small triangle up/down buttons. One should be highlighted (green for up, red for down).

tests.label: SAVE SESSION and CLEAR CHAT buttons work

steps.name: be_save_clear_session
steps.text: The chat panel should show suggested queries (not message bubbles). The SAVE SESSION and CLEAR CHAT buttons should not be visible.

steps.name: be_clear_scene
steps.text: The graph area should show an EMPTY SCENE prompt with seed buttons. The data panel should show binary overview. No nodes should be in the graph SVG area.

tests.label: Classifier Lab renders with project list
Research tab shows SOTA markdown report
Data tab shows class distribution and validation gate
Tune tab shows Optuna trials and HP importance
Train tab shows leaderboard and GPU picker
Benchmark tab shows comparison grid and parallel coordinates
Evaluate tab shows confusion matrix, metrics, holdout gate, shadow gauge
Promote tab shows winner card, export options, deployment target
Clicking a project in left pane updates main view
Discovery: binary list loaded from ArangoDB (not hardcoded)
Discovery: droid binary has >100 features in ArangoDB
Discovery: droid has RPCs, events, schemas, state machines, namespaces
Discovery: droid has edges (contains, triggers, emits, payload, has_parameter)
Discovery: switching to tunnel loads different features than droid
Discovery: data panel shows binary overview with namespaces before any click

steps.script: const el = document.querySelector('[data-testid="ingest-progress"], [data-testid="progress-panel"], .ingest-progress, .progress-panel'); return el !== null && el.offsetParent !== null

tests.label: SSE events update stage progress in real time
Progress bar percentage advances as stages complete

steps.script: const bar = document.querySelector('[data-testid="ingest-progress-bar"], .progress-bar, [role="progressbar"]'); const after = bar ? (parseFloat(bar.style.width) || parseFloat(bar.getAttribute('aria-valuenow')) || 0) : 0; return after >= window.__ingestProgressBefore

tests.label: On ingest complete, new binary appears in left pane

steps.name: be_ingest_new_binary_selectable

tests.label: New binary can be seeded in graph explorer

steps.name: be_ingest_new_binary_seed
steps.text: The graph should show 3-8 circular nodes spread across the canvas with visible labels. Nodes should not be crammed together. The scene counter should show a small number.

tests.label: New binary nodes can be clicked and expanded

steps.script: const nodes = document.querySelectorAll('g.nodes g, [data-testid^="graph-node"], .graph-node'); if(nodes.length > 0) nodes[0].dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', {bubbles: true}))
document.querySelectorAll('g.nodes g, [data-testid^="graph-node"], .graph-node')[0]?.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('contextmenu', {bubbles: true, clientX: 400, clientY: 300}))

steps.name: be_ingest_new_binary_click_expand
steps.text: A node should be highlighted with a purple glow. Edges (colored lines) should connect to neighbor nodes. The data panel should show the selected node name and connection count.

tests.label: Visual: empty scene shows seed buttons and data overview

steps.name: empty_scene
steps.text: The page shows a dark graph area with an EMPTY SCENE prompt containing seed buttons (Seed: Namespaces, Seed: Top 8 Hubs). Below the graph is a data panel showing DROID binary overview with namespace chips and feature counts. On the right is a chat panel with suggested queries. Are all these elements visible?

tests.label: Visual: seeded namespaces show 3-5 spread nodes with labels

steps.name: seeded
steps.text: The graph shows 3-5 circular nodes spread across the dark canvas (not crammed together). Each node should have a visible label (daemon, droid, tunnel). The nodes should be different sizes. Are nodes visible, spread out, and labeled?

tests.label: Visual: clicked node shows glow, edges to neighbors, and data panel

steps.name: clicked_with_edges
steps.text: One node should be highlighted (purple glow/ring). There should be visible colored edges (lines with arrowheads) connecting the selected node to its neighbors. Additional neighbor nodes should have appeared. The data panel at the bottom should show the selected node name, connections count, and clickable connection chips. Are the selected node highlighted, edges visible, and neighbors shown?

tests.label: Visual: minimap shows node dots and viewport rectangle

steps.name: minimap
steps.text: In the bottom-right corner of the graph area, there should be a small dark rectangle (minimap) containing colored dots representing nodes and a dashed purple rectangle showing the current viewport. Is the minimap visible with dots and a viewport rectangle?

tests.label: Visual: data panel summary shows connections as clickable chips

steps.name: data_panel_summary
steps.text: The data panel at the bottom should show: (1) node description text, (2) large stat numbers for connections/fields/states/confidence, (3) connection chips grouped by edge type (TRIGGERS, EMITS, PAYLOAD, CONTAINS) with cyan-colored clickable names, (4) a Bookmark to Memory button. Are all these elements visible and properly formatted?

steps.name: dblclick_fit
steps.text: All namespace nodes should be visible and centered in the viewport after double-click fit. No nodes should be off-screen.

tests.label: Drag node stays in new position

steps.name: drag_node
steps.text: A node should have moved from its original position. The dragged node should be displaced from the cluster.

tests.label: Rapid clicks don't crash the graph

steps.name: rapid_clicks
steps.text: Graph should still be rendering with nodes visible. No blank/empty graph. No error overlay.

tests.label: Node hover shows tooltip with tier and connections

steps.name: hover_tooltip
steps.text: A tooltip should appear near the hovered node showing: node name, node type, tier badge (T0/T1/T2), connection count, and CLICK TO ANALYZE text.

tests.label: Tier badges visible on nodes (T0 green, T1 blue, T2 amber)

steps.name: tier_badges
steps.text: Small colored dots should be visible at the top-right of each node: green for T0, blue for T1, amber for T2.

tests.label: Edge arrowheads point in correct direction

steps.name: arrowheads
steps.text: Edges should have small colored arrowheads at their endpoints. Arrowheads point FROM source TO target. Triggers edges are green, emits are orange, payload are blue.

tests.label: State machine nodes have dashed ring

steps.name: state_ring
steps.text: State machine nodes should have an extra dashed circular ring around them, distinguishing them from regular nodes.

tests.label: Cluster hulls with labels around grouped nodes

steps.name: hulls
steps.text: Dashed purple outlines (convex hulls) should enclose groups of nodes that belong to the same namespace. Hull labels (daemon, droid, schema etc) should be visible.

tests.label: New nodes animate in (radius grows from 0)

steps.name: entrance_done
steps.text: Nodes should have grown from small to full size. Compare with the early screenshot — nodes should be larger now.

tests.label: High-degree nodes are visually larger than leaf nodes

steps.name: node_sizes
steps.text: Hub nodes (with high connection counts shown as badges) should be noticeably larger circles than nodes with few connections. Namespace nodes should be the largest.

tests.label: Breadcrumb click navigates back to previous node

steps.name: breadcrumbs
steps.text: A breadcrumb trail should show 2+ node names separated by arrows. The last breadcrumb should be highlighted in accent color.

tests.label: Save scene and load it from dropdown

steps.name: scene_saved
steps.text: The scene name input should have been used and a scene saved. The saved scenes section should appear in the left pane.

tests.label: Right-click Remove from Scene removes the node

steps.name: removed_node
steps.text: One fewer node should be visible. The graph should have one less node than before the remove action.

tests.label: Stratified layout arranges nodes in horizontal tiers

steps.name: stratified
steps.text: Nodes should be arranged in horizontal tiers/layers based on type. Namespaces at top, RPCs in middle, events/schemas at bottom. NOT a random organic layout.

tests.label: Clustered layout groups nodes by namespace

steps.name: clustered
steps.text: Nodes should be grouped into spatial clusters based on their namespace. Daemon nodes in one area, droid in another. Clear visual separation between clusters.

tests.label: Security perspective shows only security-relevant node types

steps.name: security_perspective
steps.text: Graph should show only security-relevant node types (RPCs, schemas, events, namespaces). State machines and parameters should be hidden.

tests.label: Thumbs down + correction creates training pair in /memory

steps.text: I meant the daemon namespace not a random node

steps.name: correction_flow
steps.text: The chat should show: user message, assistant response with thumbs, then a correction message. The correction should have been submitted as a new message.

tests.label: Minimap shows colored dots and viewport rectangle

steps.name: minimap_visible
steps.text: Bottom-right of the graph should show a small dark minimap rectangle with colored dots (matching node colors) and a dashed purple viewport rectangle.

steps.script: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector("[data-qid=\"sparta:nav:settings\"]"); if (!btn) return "NOT_FOUND"; const rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect(); return JSON.stringify({ width: rect.width, height: rect.height, hasQsAction: btn.hasAttribute("data-qs-action") }); })()
